concerns.text: T059 (ingest demographics) is listed AFTER T025 (impute confounders). T025 requires demographics data for imputation, so T059 must precede T025. Current order: T021→T022→T023→T024→T025→T059→T020. Fix: move T059 before T025.

T060 (consent documentation) is in Phase 8, after US1-US5 data processing. Constitution Principle VI requires consent before any participant-derived data processing. T060 must precede T006 (download_datasets) and all US1-US5 tasks.

T075 (ethical review document) and T078 (consent language template) are in Phase 9, after data acquisition. These must precede T006 (download_datasets) per Constitution Principle VI. Current placement violates ethical data handling requirements.

T062 (external agency scale dataset) is in Phase 10, but T058 (US4 validation) depends on it. T058 requires the external scale file to exist. T062 must be moved to Phase 2 (Foundational) or Phase 6 (before US4 tasks).

T011-T013 (unit tests) are listed after T014-T019 (implementation). While this is acceptable for task ordering, consider grouping tests immediately after their corresponding implementation tasks for clearer US1 independence verification.
